calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RESPONDENT INDIAN HARBOR INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions

Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Jesse A. Boyd, Esq. of KOELLER, NEBEKER, CARLSON & HALUCK, LLP, Tel: 916.724.5700, for respondent/moving party;
No other appearance.

The tentative ruling was not contested or argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling on RESPONDENT INDIAN HARBOR INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions, with the moving party's name corrected, as follows:

Indian Harbor Insurance Co.'s motion to compel is granted in part and denied in part as articulated in the judge pro tem's report and recommendation, which is adopted.

Order signed after hearing.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

Petition To Compel Arbitration With Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Matthew Russell, Esq. 310-887-1818 BD & J for PETITIONER MARLON COOPER.
No other Appearance.

RULING - Mr. Russell does not oppose the matter. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER MARLON COOPER'S Petition To Compel Arbitration

Marlon Cooper's unopposed "petition to compel arbitration" is granted.

Petitioner to submit a proposed form of order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Mar-24-2023 Continued To Apr-17-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Matthew Russell, Esq. 310-887-1818 BD&J for Petitioner.
Jay Patterson, Esq. 916-724-5700 for Respondent.

RULING - ARGUED. Parties to meet and confer on #25. Parties to send status on #25 via email directly to the Judge Pro tem at davididaho14@gmail.com.

RESPONDENT INDIAN HARBOR INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions.

Plaintiff's Counsel do(es) not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem. The matter is continued to 4/17/23 at 9:30 am in Department 302, Law and Motion Department. Judge Pro tem to prepare report and recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: M. Goodman, not reported. =(302/JPT)
